title: pityrogramma ascensionis
intro: Pityrogramma ascensionis, also known as the Lady fern or Golden fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae and is native to the tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pityrogramma ascensionis include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and protecting against oxidative stress, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Pityrogramma ascensionis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant extracts in capsule or tincture form to support overall health and well-being.
